questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Which of the salts have identical solubilities in methanol?
questions.solution: Enantiomers have same solubility in optically inactive solvents so (I) and (IV) have same solubility because they are enantiomers.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: The correct order of increasing basicity of the given conjugate bases $\left(\mathrm{R}=\mathrm{CH}_3\right)$ is
questions.solution:
Correct order of increasing basic strength is
$\mathrm{R}-\mathrm{COO}^{-} \lt \mathrm{CH} \equiv \mathrm{C}^{-} \lt \mathrm{NH}_2^{-} \lt \mathrm{R}^{-}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
